title: Phase 1C: Approval, audit, exception, and notification services
description: Build the approval engine service (create requests, approve/deny, escalation), audit event service (create and query audit events), exception engine service (create, assign, resolve, escalate exceptions), and notification service shell (internal, SMS, email placeholders).
steps: Create src/lib/approvals/engine.ts with approval request lifecycle management
Implement approval chain: request -> pending -> approved/denied, with multi-step support
Create src/lib/events/audit.ts with audit event creation and querying
Implement timeline assembly from audit events for any entity
Create src/lib/events/security.ts with security event logging (login, permission changes, etc.)
Create src/lib/exceptions/engine.ts with exception lifecycle (create, assign, resolve, escalate)
Implement SLA timer tracking and auto-escalation logic
Create src/lib/notifications/service.ts with notification dispatch (internal alerts, SMS shell, email shell)
